description: Generic risk assessment and decision scoring framework. Products register their own factor evaluators for domain-specific risk models; no product-specific risk logic is built in.

defaultRiskModel.description: Default risk model ID when none is specified in a scoring request. Defaults to 'OPERATIONAL'.

alertThresholdHigh.description: Risk score threshold [0.0, 1.0] above which a HIGH alert is raised. Defaults to 0.75.

alertThresholdCritical.description: Risk score threshold [0.0, 1.0] above which a CRITICAL alert is raised. Defaults to 0.90.

explainabilityEnabled.description: Whether factor-level explainability context is attached to scoring results. Defaults to true.
